script: for u in axel jose lia afrah; do sudo cp -r /home/azureuser/.azure /home/$u/.azure 2>/dev/null; sudo chown -R $u:$u /home/$u/.azure; echo $u: $(sudo -u $u az account show --query name -o tsv 2>&1 | head -1); done; sudo systemctl restart axel-responder.service jose-responder.service lia-responder.service afrah-responder.service; sleep 4; for s in axel-responder jose-responder lia-responder afrah-responder; do echo "$s: $(systemctl is-active $s.service)"; done
